Dex/Bullseye x User/Vigilante

Synopsis: Dex infiltrates a restaurant expecting to find and kill Wilson Fisk, only to discover the building already filled with dead guards. Realizing someone else is hunting the same target, he enters the bloodstained hall and comes face to face with a vigilante.
